news_items.title: Quantum News Briefs: April 19, 2024
news_items.summary: D-Wave introduces new fast anneal feature extending quantum computing performance gains, allowing dramatically faster quantum annealing times in their Leap real-time quantum cloud service.

news_items.title: Rigetti CEO: Quantum Computing, AI Key To Future Growth
news_items.summary: Rigetti Computing CEO forecasts that advancements in quantum computing and AI will be pivotal growth drivers in 2026, with projections for achieving 'quantum advantage' within 3-5 years and fault-tolerant quantum computing in 7-9 years.

news_items.summary: Latest quantum computing news including SEALSQ and WISeKey setting up Geneva HQ with quantum focus, Chinese quantum computing maintaining global top tier status, and cryogenic switching breakthroughs for scalable quantum computing.

summary: The latest technology news from the past 6 hours highlights significant advances in AI and quantum computing. Key themes include the convergence of AI and quantum technologies, enterprise adoption of quantum computing, hardware innovations, and the transition from laboratory research to practical applications. Major companies like Google, IBM, and Rigetti are making substantial progress in quantum computing capabilities, while AI continues to drive transformation across industries.
